dashboard.title: ProcessAce
dashboard.subtitle: AI-Powered Process Discovery & Documentation
dashboard.supportedFormats: Support for Audio (future), Video (future), and Documents (available!)

dashboard.noJobs: No jobs yet. Upload evidence to start.
dashboard.transcriptHelp: Review the automatically generated transcript below. You can make manual corrections before processing it into process artifacts.

workspace.label: Workspace:
workspace.viewerMessage: You have viewer access. You cannot start new jobs.

userSettings.title: User Settings - ProcessAce
userSettings.passwordHelp: Must be at least 8 characters, with lowercase, uppercase, and numbers.
userSettings.currentPasswordRequired: Current password is required to set a new password
userSettings.passwordRequirements: Password must be at least 8 characters long and include uppercase, lowercase, and numbers.
userSettings.exportHelp: Download a JSON export of your account profile, workspace memberships, artifacts, jobs, notifications, and consent history.
userSettings.exportFailed: Failed to export your account data.
userSettings.consentHistoryHelp: Required service consents are recorded when your account is created and shown here for audit purposes.
userSettings.noConsentHistory: No consent history was found for this account.
userSettings.deactivateHelp: Your account will be marked inactive and your owned workspaces will be transferred to the primary superadmin.
userSettings.deactivateWarning: This signs you out immediately. Organizational workspaces, evidence, jobs, and artifacts are preserved.
userSettings.deactivatePasswordRequired: Current password is required to deactivate your account.
userSettings.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate your account now? Workspace ownership will be transferred and you will be signed out immediately.

workspaceSettings.title: Workspace Settings - ProcessAce
workspaceSettings.pageSubtitle: Manage your workspaces and shared collaborations
workspaceSettings.noMyWorkspaces: You haven't created any workspaces yet.
workspaceSettings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this workspace? This defaults ALL jobs, evidence, and artifacts associated with it. This cannot be undone.
workspaceSettings.inviteError: An error occurred while sending the invitation
workspaceSettings.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this member?
workspaceSettings.transferOwnershipConfirm: Transfer workspace ownership to this member now?
workspaceSettings.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this invitation?

notifications.title: Notifications - ProcessAce

notifications.declineConfirm: Are you sure you want to decline this invitation?

appSettings.title: App Settings - ProcessAce
appSettings.baseUrlHelp: Leave empty for default provider URLs. Use for local LLMs like Ollama or LocalAI.
appSettings.baseUrlHelpOpenai: Optional override for trusted OpenAI-compatible endpoints.
appSettings.baseUrlHelpOllama: Used only for Ollama. Include the /v1 path. If you enabled the Ollama Docker override, use http://ollama:11434/v1. Host-based Docker setups may use http://host.docker.internal:11434/v1.
appSettings.loadModelsHelp: Click "Load Models" to fetch available models for the selected provider. For Ollama, this also refreshes installed status in the local model manager.
appSettings.modelFilterHelp: Type to filter models. Use "Load Models" to refresh options.
appSettings.modelManagerDescription: Review the recommended Ollama catalog, install the models you want to use, and uninstall local models you no longer need.
appSettings.checkModelStatusHelp: Click "Check Status" to refresh installed status and available actions for the Ollama catalog.
appSettings.modelCatalogSummary: Click "Check Status" to refresh installed status and available actions.
appSettings.ollamaUnavailableMessage: Ollama is not available with the current configuration.
appSettings.ollamaGuideLinkLabel: Open the Ollama setup guide on GitHub.
appSettings.uninstallModelConfirm: Are you sure you want to uninstall {{model}}?
appSettings.uninstallModelFailed: Failed to uninstall the selected model.
appSettings.modelSelectedSuccess: {{model}} is now selected as the default model.
appSettings.noInstalledOllamaModels: No Ollama models are installed yet. Install one in section 2.1 Local Model Manager below.
appSettings.modelPullIdle: Select a model to begin the download.
appSettings.modelPullStatusFailed: Failed to fetch model download status.
appSettings.modelCatalogLoadFailed: Failed to load the Ollama model catalog.
appSettings.transcriptionModelManagerDescription: Review the recommended local transcription catalog, install the models you want to use, and uninstall local models you no longer need.
appSettings.checkTranscriptionModelStatusHelp: Click "Check Status" to refresh installed status and available actions for the transcription catalog.
appSettings.transcriptionModelCatalogSummary: Click "Check Status" to refresh installed status and available actions.
appSettings.transcriptionModelCatalogLoadFailed: Failed to load the local transcription model catalog.
appSettings.noInstalledOllamaTranscriptionModels: No local transcription models are installed yet. Install one in section 3.1 Local Transcription Model Manager below.
appSettings.selectOllamaTranscriptionModelFirst: Download and select an installed local transcription model before saving.
appSettings.unsupportedOllamaTranscriptionWarning: Local Ollama transcription is not supported by the current runtime. Switch the transcription provider to OpenAI.
appSettings.localModelsDesc: Ollama is available as a first-class provider above. Trusted OpenAI-compatible custom endpoints remain available through the optional OpenAI base URL override.
appSettings.selectProviderFirst: Please select a configured provider first.
appSettings.noSupportedTranscriptionModels: No supported transcription models were found for this provider.
appSettings.selectOllamaModelFirst: Download and select an installed Ollama model before saving.
appSettings.deleteKeyConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the {{provider}} API key?
appSettings.enterValidKey: Please enter a valid API key for {{provider}}
appSettings.noModelsLoaded: No models loaded. Click "Load Models" to fetch models.
appSettings.noModelsForProvider: No models found for this provider.
appSettings.resetSectionDescription: Permanently delete all users, workspaces, evidence, artifacts, notifications, settings, and uploaded files. The instance will return to an empty bootstrap state.
appSettings.resetSectionWarning: This action cannot be undone. Type DELETE ALL exactly and confirm with your current password before continuing.
appSettings.resetConfirmationMismatch: You must type DELETE ALL exactly before continuing.
appSettings.resetPasswordRequired: Current password is required to reset the application.
appSettings.resetConfirm: Delete all application data now? This will remove every user and workspace from the installation.
appSettings.resetFailed: Failed to reset the application instance.
appSettings.loadTranscriptionModelsHelp: Click "Load Transcription Models" to fetch and validate available models.

about.title: About ProcessAce
about.subtitle: ProcessAce helps teams turn interviews, recordings, and documents into structured process documentation.
about.productDescription: ProcessAce is an AI-powered process discovery and documentation application built for self-hosted teams.
about.productDetails: It transforms source material into BPMN diagrams, SIPOC tables, RACI matrices, and narrative process documentation.
about.websiteHelp: Visit the main site for product details and updates.
about.repoHelp: Review the source code, issues, and project activity.
about.communityDisclosureBody: This ProcessAce build is the Community Version and is distributed under the project license terms.

modals.unsavedMessage: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to save them before leaving?
